List historical policy decision logs for an organization.

Each log entry records the config that was evaluated, the decision
result (pass/fail), and any policy violations. Use --after and
--before to filter by time range.


JSON Fields:
  id, created_at, decision, metadata

Usage:
  policy logs [flags]

Examples:
# List recent decision logs:
$ circleci policy logs --owner-id <org-id>

# Filter to a time range:
$ circleci policy logs --owner-id <org-id> \
    --after 2024-01-01 --before 2024-02-01

# List as JSON:
$ circleci policy logs --owner-id <org-id> --json


Flags:
      --after string        Filter logs after this timestamp (RFC3339)
      --before string       Filter logs before this timestamp (RFC3339)
  -h, --help                help for logs
      --jq expression       Filter JSON output with a jq expression
  -j, --json                Output as JSON
      --limit int           Maximum number of logs to return (default 20)
      --owner-id string     Organization ID
      --plain               Plain text output (tab-separated, no color)
      --template template   Format output using a Go template
